chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

parts.text: نَظَرَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ

text: «مَا كَانَ هَذَا لَوْ هَيَّأَ مِنْ لِحْيَتِهِ » فَبَلَغَ اَلرَّجُلَ ذَلِكَ فَهَيَّأَ مِنْ لِحْيَتِهِ بَيْنَ اَللِّحْيَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ عَلَى اَلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَلَمَّا رَآهُ قَالَ «هَكَذَا فَافْعَلُوا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.330 - "The Messenger of Allah (sw) once saw (looked) a man with a long beard, and said: "It would have been better if he had trimmed his beard.
When the man heard this, he trimmed his beard to a moderate length. Then entered to see the Prophet. When the Prophet saw him, He (sw) said: "This is how you should do it. "
